Scene: Avilia sends a tiny one-line patch paper into an open-source repository mailbox. A small badge says "merged". She looks quietly happy, as if a small contribution mattered.

Core meaning: even a one-line fix and PR merge can be a meaningful technical growth experience.

Style: warm Chinese technical blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, small blue merge check. Minimal labels: "一行修复", "PR", "merged".
